data.title: Bank of America: U.S. stablecoin supply may increase by $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term due to the GENIUS Act
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of America said that with the passage of the GENIUS Act, the supply of stablecoins is expected to grow by $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term. The bill lays the foundation for stablecoin regulation in the United States and promotes the development of related infrastructure and tokenized finance. Bank of America also pointed out that the banking industry is preparing to issue stablecoins through a consortium model. This growth is expected to drive an increase in demand for U.S. Treasuries and promote the widespread adoption of digital assets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Stablecoin Supply Expected to Surge Following GENIUS Act Passage
data.description: According to PANews, Bank of America anticipates a significant increase in stablecoin supply, projecting a rise of $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term following the passage of the GENIUS Act. This legislation establishes a regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States, fostering the development of related infrastructure and tokenized finance. The bank also highlighted that the banking sector is preparing to issue stablecoins through a consortium model. This growth is expected to boost demand for U.S. Treasury bonds and promote the widespread adoption of digital assets.

data.title: Former Ethereum core developer: ETH's bullish logic in the next few years is not corporate balance sheet configuration, but the global adoption of stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eric Conner, a former Ethereum core developer, posted on a social platform that the bullish logic of ETH in the next few years is not the allocation of corporate balance sheets, but the global adoption of stablecoins. He pointed out that people around the world want to gain exposure to the US dollar, and this demand will usher in explosive growth. In the process, potentially billions of people will discover the Ethereum network.

data.title: iShares Ethereum ETF becomes 3rd-fastest ETF to hit $10B in assets
data.description:
BlackRock’s iShares Ethereum ETF reached $10 billion in assets in just 251 days since its launch one year ago, while its Bitcoin ETF took only 34 days to break the milestone.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/blackrock-spot-ether-etf-third-fastest-10-billion-assets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF Achieves Rapid Growth Milestone
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, BlackRock's spot Ether exchange-traded fund (ETF), known as the iShares Ethereum ETF (ETHA), has rapidly ascended to become one of the fastest-growing ETFs globally. This achievement places it alongside two other cryptocurrency funds in terms of growth speed. Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas reported that ETHA has become the third-fastest ETF to reach $10 billion in total assets under management (AUM), achieving this milestone in just 251 days since its launch. Balchunas highlighted the remarkable growth, noting that ETHA doubled its assets from $5 billion to $10 billion in a mere 10 days, describing this surge as akin to a "God candle." This rapid expansion positions ETHA ahead of the JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Income ETF (JEPQ), which took 444 days to reach the same asset level.

The unprecedented growth of ETHA underscores the increasing popularity and demand for spot crypto ETFs, as noted by Nate Geraci, president of NovaDius Wealth Management. Geraci emphasized the significance of this trend, pointing out that the ETF industry has been established for over three decades and comprises nearly 4,400 products. Despite ETHA's impressive growth, BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF remains the leader in terms of rapid asset accumulation. Launched in January 2024, the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) set a record by reaching $10 billion in AUM just 34 days after its debut. Fidelity Investments' Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (FBTC) followed closely, achieving the same milestone in 54 days.

In recent months, Ether ETFs have experienced a notable increase in inflows, particularly in July, while Bitcoin ETFs have seen a slowdown. Data from SoSoValue indicates that Ether ETFs in the United States have maintained a 14-day inflow streak, accumulating $4.4 billion since July 3. This streak includes a significant daily inflow of $726.7 million, marking the largest since the ETF's launch last July. Conversely, Bitcoin ETFs have encountered challenges, with inflows turning negative on July 21 after a 12-day streak. Since then, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have experienced $289 million in outflows over the past three trading days, according to SoSoValue data. This shift in investor sentiment highlights the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency ETF market and the evolving preferences of investors.

data.title: Ethereum's Future Growth Tied to Stablecoin Adoption, Says Former Developer
data.description: According to BlockBeats, former Ethereum core developer Eric Conner has expressed that the future growth of Ethereum (ETH) in the coming years is not primarily driven by the adoption of 'treasury companies.' Instead, Conner believes the real bullish logic lies in the global proliferation of stablecoins. He suggests that people worldwide are eager to gain exposure to the U.S. dollar, and this demand is expected to grow exponentially. Through this process, billions of individuals may come into contact with and become familiar with Ethereum.

data.title: BlackRock ETHA has accumulated 1.035 million ETH since July, with a total holding of 2.8 million ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock ETHA has accumulated 1,035,653 ETH since July 1, worth about $3.76 billion. Currently, BlackRock holds a total of 2.8 million ETH, worth about $10.22 billion.

data.title: Justin Sun appeared at the TRON.Inc renaming bell ceremony
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On July 24, Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, was invited to participate in the opening bell ringing ceremony of the Nasdaq Stock Exchange as a strategic advisor to TRON.Inc, celebrating the official name change of TRON. Inc (NASDAQ: TRON), a Nasdaq-listed company. In June this year, TRON. Inc's predecessor, SRM Entertainment, which is listed on Nasdaq, announced plans to launch a TRON corporate treasury strategy of up to $210 million and change its name to Tron Inc. On July 16, SRM Entertainment officially changed its name to Tron Inc, and changed its stock code from "SRM" to "TRON" on Nasdaq from July 17, 2025.
Justin Sun said: "I am very proud to tell you that TRON (TRX) has been strategically reserved by a Nasdaq-listed company. I believe that this is not only a big step for TRON.Inc, but also an important moment for the entire blockchain industry, which is worth remembering together. This also marks the true beginning of the cryptocurrency era. Finally, I would like to thank my family for their support along the way; I would also like to thank our team, who have been working day and night to build the entire ecosystem."

data.title: Cryptocurrency Stocks Decline Amid Tether's U.S. Market Plans
data.description:
According to Foresight News, several cryptocurrency-related stocks in the U.S. market have experienced declines. As of the latest reports, Circle (CRCL.US) has dropped by over 4.7%. This comes as Tether's CEO, Paolo Ardoino, announced that Tether is prepared to operate in the U.S. market.

Additionally, MARA Holdings (MARA.US) saw a decrease of 0.85%, IREN Ltd (IREN.US) fell by more than 2.5%, and Strategy (MSTR.US) declined by nearly 1%. These movements reflect the ongoing volatility and competitive dynamics within the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Bitmine increases its market share offering to $4.5 billion to increase Ethereum holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitmine Immersion (BMNR) has increased the size of its "at-the-market offering" (ATM) plan from $2 billion to $4.5 billion. The company submitted a prospectus supplement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on July 24, authorizing the continued sale of common stock in the open market through two brokerages, Cantor Fitzgerald and ThinkEquity. This additional issuance provides financial support for the company to further increase its holdings of ETH and expand its asset reserves. 
It was previously reported that Bitmine updated its ETH holdings. As of 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 today, Beijing Time), Bitmine held a total of 566,776 ETH, worth more than $2 billion.

data.title: Binance Recognized Among Top Fintech Innovators in 2025
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting Binance's recognition as one of the top companies in the Digital Assets category of CNBC’s 2025 World’s Top Fintech Companies list. This annual list, compiled by CNBC and Statista, acknowledges 300 leading fintech companies across seven market segments, emphasizing Binance's significant role in advancing blockchain solutions and promoting digital-asset adoption on a global scale. The Digital Assets category, which includes blockchain, cryptocurrency, and NFT platforms, showcases innovators who are shaping the future of finance. Now in its third year, the list celebrates companies making a substantial impact on the global financial landscape.

The World’s Top Fintech Companies list is independently compiled by CNBC and Statista, a global leader in market research and rankings. The selection process is based on independent journalistic criteria and rigorous evaluation, offering both consumers and businesses trusted insights into industry leaders. Statista, with over 100 expert analysts and partnerships with 45 leading media brands worldwide, ensures the rankings are transparent and reliable. This recognition provides companies like Binance with acknowledgment that genuinely reflects their contributions to the fintech and blockchain sectors.

To determine the 300 honorees, CNBC and Statista assessed a combination of publicly available data and company submissions collected between February and May 2025. The evaluation process weighted metrics reflecting growth, reach, and reputation at 40%, while segment-specific variables, which measure innovation and performance within each category, carried a 60% weight. This methodology ensures that companies excelling in both scale and specialized innovation rise to the top of the list.

Securing a top position in the Digital Assets segment underscores Binance’s responsible leadership and innovation in the blockchain industry. This recognition validates Binance's commitment to compliance, advancing blockchain education, and developing products that empower users. It also highlights Binance's global reach and dedication to making digital assets more accessible, secure, and impactful for users worldwide.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed GameSquare acquires Compound founder's CryptoPunk #5577 for $5.15 million in preferred shares
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed GameSquare Holdings (NASDAQ: GAME) announced that it would acquire CryptoPunk #5577 held by Robert Leshner, the founder of DeFi protocol Compound, for $5.15 million in preferred shares. It is reported that this is GameSquare's first direct investment in NFT.
GameSquare currently holds approximately 12,913.49 ETH, and the total value of Ethereum assets is approximately US$52 million. (Chainwire)

data.title: Could Crypto Bets Serve as a "Powell Play" Hedge?
data.description:
As speculation grows over President Trump’s potential dismissal of Fed Chair Jerome Powell, markets are rattled by fears of politicized monetary policy, a weaker dollar, and rising inflation, with crypto emerging as both a hedge and a high-volatility play.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/24/could-crypto-bets-serve-as-a-powell-play-hedge/
